main.description: Computed feature vector for a Tangled user, derived from their repos, stars, and follows. Stored by the FYP agent under its own DID as persistent state.

did.description: The DID of the user this vector describes.

languages.description: Normalised language distribution (sums to 1.0). Keys are lowercase language names.

topics.description: Normalised topic frequency across owned repos (sums to 1.0).

follows.description: DIDs this user follows on Tangled.

lastActive.description: Most recent activity timestamp (star or repo creation).

repos.description: Summary of owned repos, used for repo recommendations.

languages.description: Normalised language distribution for this specific repo.
